description:
Debug Network Faster & Smarter with Proxyman

Proxyman is a high-performance Windows app, which enables developers to capture, inspect, and manipulate HTTP/HTTPS requests/responses with ease.
✨ Features
- Intercept Webbrowser with 1 click. Works with Chrome, Firefox, Edge and Brave.
- Import from Proxyman Session file.

⚡️ Improve
- Improve how we install the CA Certificate by using Command Line
- [Map Local] Introduce the Delay Setting for Map Local Rule

🐞 Bugs
- Fixed: Can't make a request without Scheme in the Compose Tool
- Fixed: Sorting columns in the Diff View doesn't work
- Fixed: Crash if use Breakpoint with Status Code 100
- Fixed: Can't import cURL from from Postman (has --location flag)
- Fixed: Export Websocket in Raw Format doesn't contains the websocket messages
